problem_statement.fact: The first fallback widened the non-GT spatial-NMS backend from p90/k100/d5 to p80/k200/d3 and produced a structurally valid 200-candidate pool, but evaluation-only label join still found zero valid candidates for bxsVRursffK::bed.
problem_statement.agent_inference: The remaining failure is less likely to be solved by another spatial-NMS point-density change. The next predeclared probe should change the backend granularity to connected component candidates so that large high-score regions are represented by component centroids and best-view cells rather than only NMS-selected points.
problem_statement.paper_constraint: This is still a diagnostic backend recall branch. It was triggered by evaluation-only no-valid reporting, so it cannot be used as a paper-facing terminal action policy unless later evaluated on a predeclared all-row or non-GT pool-validity trigger.

second_fallback_variant.reason: Switch from point-level spatial NMS to connected-component export after the fixed wider spatial-NMS fallback remained no-valid.

allowed_action_inputs: backend/pool-validity branch rows written before label join
first fallback generation rows written before label join
deeper generation action rows and candidate pool accounting from spatial_nms_p90_k100_d5_v1
source and first-fallback candidate ids, ranks, scores, support scores, positive support, positions, visit positions, reachability, finite-position metadata, duplicate accounting, and backend lineage
existing non-GT VLMaps feature maps, text embeddings, alignment, and connected-component export settings
Habitat navmesh and reachability or standoff feasibility computed without GT target labels
forbidden_action_inputs: choosing component percentile, component minimum size, top-k, or backend family after inspecting component-fallback correctness
terminal commit or goal switch based on this branch contract

component_generation_accounting: report variant name, selection mode, percentile, max candidates, and min_component_cells

report component candidate count, component_cells statistics, backend_source counts, finite-position count, reachable/standoff count, positive-support count, duplicate candidate ids, and duplicate positions
report overlap with the source p90/k100/d5 spatial-NMS pool and the first p80/k200/d3 spatial-NMS fallback pool
report target scene/query artifact rows and missing artifact cases
evaluation_only_reporting: write component fallback generation rows before joining labels
join evaluation labels only in evaluated rows or summary
report whether the component fallback recovers a valid candidate pool after label join
do not change the component backend settings based on the same fallback label join
failure_accounting: if valid candidates are recovered, route only that row to later goal-validity confirmation evidence
if no valid candidate is recovered, record bxsVRursffK::bed as a backend/source-map recall blind spot for this branch
do not send a no-valid pool to goal-validity confirmation

expected_next_analyzer_or_job.name: expanded_retrieval_pool_validity_second_fallback_v1
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.role: consume the single first-fallback no-valid branch row and materialize the fixed component-level fallback backend before deciding whether the branch is recoverable or a backend blind spot
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.input_scope: rival_identity:13 only, using label-free branch rows plus first-fallback generation rows; labels may be joined only after component rows are written

promotion_rules.contract_only: Freezing this contract permits a diagnostic component fallback backend analyzer/job, not terminal ObjectNav commitment.
promotion_rules.if_component_fallback_recovers_valid_poo: The row may move to a later goal-validity confirmation evidence branch only after component fallback rows are written label-free and recovery is checked by evaluation-only join.
promotion_rules.if_component_fallback_still_no_valid: Record bxsVRursffK::bed as a backend/source-map recall blind spot and keep terminal utility blocked for this branch.
promotion_rules.paper_claim_blocked: No first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, or paper utility claim is allowed from this contract alone.

next_steps: Implement or parameterize the second-fallback analyzer/job so the component variant name and output file names are explicit.
Generate the fixed components_p80_min1_k200_v1 artifact in a background job with timestamped logs.
Join labels only after component fallback rows are written and report recovered-valid versus still-no-valid.
Keep candidate-specific goal-validity evidence for rival_identity:12 and rival_identity:14 as a separate branch.
